chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-261 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on M.A No.10106/2025 (U/A) 2. For order on M.A No.10107/2025 (Return of surety) 24.11.2025 Mr.Zeeshan Ali Memon, Advocate for the applicant/surety Mr.Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G present in Court in other matters waives notice ********* 1. Granted. 2. Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. Learned counsel for the applicant states that vide Order dated 13.4.2016, the applicant/accused Muhammad Umer was granted ad-interim pre-arrest bail by this Court and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. He further stated that vide Order dated 21.9.2017, the interim bail granted to the applicant/accused was confirmed on the same terms and conditions and subsequently vide Judgment dated 20.10.2017, the applicant/accused was acquitted of the charge by the learned trial Court, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Learned D.P.G after going through the record, tendered his no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
